_min_score_comment: Conservative floor; raise to 0.92 once extractor is wired in Phase 0 final.
_policyEntities_comment: Two entities: Test E Pte Ltd (parent, master) + Test E Energy Pte Ltd (subsidiary). The slip's per-sheet Insured field varies — GTL/GCI list both, GHS/GP/SP/Dental list only Test E Energy, GBT/WICA list only Test E Energy as Policyholder. Real-world inconsistency. Fixture captures the union.
_insurers_comment: Three insurers: HSBC Life Insurance (6 products, all share one Insurope Pool policy), Zurich Insurance Company Ltd (GBT only), Income Insurance Limited (WICA only). HSBC_LIFE and INCOME are NOT in the seed catalogue — Phase 1 follow-up (same gap pattern as Allied World on PNG, Berkshire on [REDACTED]).
_pool_comment: FIRST FIXTURE WITH NON-NULL POOL. Insurope Pool is one of the major SG group-insurance pools alongside Generali. Only GTL + GCI sheets carry the pool reference; the other 4 HSBC sheets (GHS/GP/SP/Dental) have blank Pool fields. Extractor should attach pool to the policy, not to individual products.

products._categories_comment: GTL uses 36x basic monthly salary cover. SI cells are aggregates.

products._bundling_comment: GCI title literally says 'Additional from Group Term Life' — it's a top-up to GTL. Whether the extractor treats this as bundled (bundledWithProductCode='GTL') or as a standalone product is an open question. Phase 1 will introduce the field; for now accept either.

products._plans_comment: GHS has 2 plans (CEO tier + All Other Employees tier) per the slip's basis-of-cover table. Cover-tier rates likely per-employee.

products._gbt_comment: Group Business Travel — annual flat premium per region/plan. The B177 endorsement extends Group Parent Protection to 7 employees in Test E Japan K.K. (anonymized — was [REDACTED]). Tests whether AI surfaces multi-jurisdiction GBT extension as a workbook warning.

products._wica_comment: Annual Premium cell C32 is a #VALUE! formula error in the source slip. Real data quality issue — extractor must NOT crash, must surface as a warning, must allow broker to manually enter the figure during review. WICA also has the 16136-col edge case that stresses workbook-to-text serialization.
products._plans_comment: Two classes (Technical Manager / Office Staff). Earnings-based.

reconciliation._grand_comment: HSBC products sum to 148,156.17. Plus Zurich GBT 1,640. WICA Income premium is #VALUE! in source — uncountable. Grand declared excludes WICA; allow wide range to absorb GCI/GTL bundling ambiguity and the missing WICA total.
